title: Mottu Ondru Song Lyrics Kushi
stanzas:
Mottu Ondru Song Lyrics Kushi
#Deva #Hariharan #SadhanaSargam #Vairamuthu

Yaar solvadho
yaar solvadho..

mottu ondru
malarndhida marukkum.
muttum thendral
thottu thottu thirakkum.

adhu malarin tholviyaa
illai kaattril vetriyaa
mmm yaa yaa.. (2)

kallukulle sirppam
thoongi kidakkum.
adhu kallin tholviyaa
illai uzhiyin vetriyaa.

yaar solvadho, padhil
yaar solvadho

megam enbadhu ada
malai mudichu
kaatru muttinaal
avilndhu kollum.

kadhal enbadhu
iru mana mudichu
kangal muttinaal
avilndhu kollum

megangal muttikolvadhaale
sandai endru porul illai.

dhegangal muttik kolvadhaale
oodal endru porul illai

idhalgal poi sollum
idhayam mei sollum
theriyaadhaa unmai
theriyaadhaa

kadhal vidhai pola
mounam manpola
mulaikkaadhaa mannai
thulaikkaadhaa.

yaar solvadho, padhil
yaar solvadho

pani koodangal mella
udaindhu vittaal
uyir janikkum
uyir janikkum

mouna koodangal
mella udaindhu vittaal
kadhal pirakkum
kadhal pirakkum

ullaithai moodi moodi
thaithaal kalai illai
kadhal illai.

ullangai pole
ullam vaithaal
bayam illai
baaram illai.

naanal kaanaamal
oodal kondaalum
nanaikkaadhaa nadhi
nanaikkaadhaa

kamalam neerodu
kavildhe nindraalum
thirakkaadhaa kadhir
thirakkaaddhaa.

yaar solvadho, padhil
yaar solvadho

mottu ondru
malarndhida marukkum.
muttum thendral
thottu thottu thirakkum.

adhu malarin tholviyaa
illai kaattril vetriyaa
mmm yaa yaa.. (2)

kallukulle sirppam
thoongi kidakkum.
chinna uli thatti
thatti ezhuppum.
adhu kallin tholviyaa
illai uzhiyin vetriyaa.

yaar solvadho, padhil
yaar solvadho

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Mottu Ondru'?

'Mottu Ondru' conveys the feelings of love and the beauty of romantic moments, reflecting the emotions of the characters in the movie.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie Kushi?

The song is featured during a romantic sequence, highlighting the deep connection between the lead characters as they express their feelings for each other.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Hariharan and Sadhana Sargam, with music composed by Deva.

When was 'Mottu Ondru' released?

'Mottu Ondru' was released on May 19, 2000.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Kushi, the song Mottu Ondru serves as a heartfelt expression of love between the protagonists. The soothing melody and poetic lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and warmth, making it a perfect backdrop for romantic moments. As the characters navigate their emotions, the song beautifully encapsulates the essence of their relationship. Its enchanting composition and soulful rendition leave a lasting impression on listeners, making it a beloved classic.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mottu Ondru from Kushi is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the soulful voices of Hariharan and Sadhana Sargam, paired with Deva's enchanting composition, this song is a timeless classic. Experience the magic of romance through its poetic lyrics and melodious tune that resonates with every heart.
stanzaMeanings: Who will say it, who will say it..
One flower blooms, the gentle breeze touches and opens it.
Is it the flower's failure or the victory in the wind, mmm yaa yaa.. (2)
Inside the stone, the art will rest. Is it the stone's failure or the victory of the flow?
Who will say it, who will say it?
The cloud is like a garland, when the wind blows, it will take from there.
Love is like a double knot, when the eyes kiss, it will take from there.
When the clouds gather, there is no meaning to the fight.
When the heavens gather, there is no meaning to the quarrel.
The heart that lies will say falsehood, does the truth reveal itself?
Like the seed of love, does silence grow in the earth?
Who will say it, who will say it?
If the snow gathers and melts away, life will be born, life will be born.
If the silence gathers and melts away, love will be born, love will be born.
If you close your heart, there is no art, there is no love.
If the heart is kept like a lotus, there is no fear, there is no burden.
Even if we don't see, if we quarrel, does the river not think?
Even if the lotus is touched by water, it will not open, the light will not open.
Who will say it, who will say it?
One flower blooms, the gentle breeze touches and opens it.
Is it the flower's failure or the victory in the wind, mmm yaa yaa.. (2)
Inside the stone, the art will rest. The little sound will rise. Is it the stone's failure or the victory of the flow?
Who will say it, who will say it?
